verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a consensus in Round 1 (all agents listed Thailand as a candidate). Terminating the process was the optimal decision as no disagreement existed to resolve.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly applied the evidence hierarchy, prioritizing the hard constraint of the Thai script (Linguistic/Regulatory) over the soft evidence of landscape and botanics. The reasoning was sound and led to the correct prediction.
